MaggotArmy.name: Decompose
MaggotArmy.description: Explode a body and spawn 3 Leeches.

MaggotArmy2.name: Decompose
MaggotArmy2.description: Explode a body and spawn 5 Leeches.

Reanimate.name: Reanimate
Reanimate.description: Resurrect a body to half HP. It becomes a Zombie and joins your team.

Reanimate2.description: Resurrect a body to full HP. It becomes a Zombie and joins your team.

Rebirth.name: Rebirth
Rebirth.description: Teleport into a body, destroying it to heal 4 HP, gain +1 [img:int] and +1 [img:con].

Rebirth2.name: Rebirth
Rebirth2.description: Teleport into a body, destroying it to heal 4 HP and gain All Stats Up.

Pestilence2.description:
Deal 1 damage to all units.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Weakness2.description: Give a unit Weakness 5 and All Stats Down.

SoulSuck.name: Dark Ritual
SoulSuck.description: Destroy an adjacent body. The next spell you cast costs 0 mana.

SoulSuck2.description: Destroy an adjacent body. The next 2 spells you cast cost 0 mana.

EvilIncarnate2.description: Inflict Fear 1 and Weakness 2 on all enemies.

SoulLink.name: Soul Link
SoulLink.description: Inflict Soul Link on units in an area.

SoulLink2.description: Inflict Soul Link on units in a large area.

WeAreOne.name: We Are One
WeAreOne.description: Inflict Soul Link on yourself and every enemy.

WeAreOne2.description: Inflict Soul Link on yourself and every enemy. Gain +2 [img:con] and heal 8 HP.

BloodRain.name: Blood Rain
BloodRain.description: Take 1 damage and heal all allies 1 HP.

BloodRain2.description: Take 1 damage, heal all allies 1 HP and give them +1 mana.

AnimateDead.name: Eternal Servitude
AnimateDead.description: Resurrect an enemy body to full HP. It joins your team.

AnimateDead2.description: Resurrect an enemy body to full HP. It joins your team and takes an extra turn after this one.

DeathBloom.name: Death Bloom
DeathBloom.description: Explode a body, dealing damage and Knockback to adjacent units.

DeathBloom2.name: Death Bloom
DeathBloom2.description: Explode a body, dealing damage and Knockback to units in a large area.

Scare.name: Scare
Scare.description: Teleport in front of an enemy then Knockback each adjacent unit 4 tiles.

Scare2.description: Teleport in front of an enemy then inflict Knockback 4 and Fear on each adjacent unit.

SoulTransfer.name: Soul Transfer
SoulTransfer.description: Give a unit +1 [img:con] and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 [img:con] and lose 4 health.

SoulTransfer2.description:
Give a unit +1 [img:con] and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 [img:con] and lose 4 health.
This spell can revive units. If the unit revived was an enemy it gets charmed for the battle.

Whisper.name: Whisper
Whisper.description: Inflict Fear and Madness on an adjacent unit.

Whisper2.description: Inflict Fear 1 and Madness 2 on a unit in range 4.

SummonShade.name: Summon Shade
SummonShade.description:
Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7](The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.)[/s]

SummonShade2.description:
Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its second turn.
[s:.7](The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.)[/s]

DarkStep2.description: Teleport to a tile. If you teleport into a unit you both take 5 damage, then inflict Fear on it.

Leeches2.description: Inflict Leech 1 and Mana Leech 1 on a unit.

Shriek.name: Shriek
Shriek.description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, and Madness 2 on units within a cone.

Shriek2.description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, Madness 2 and drain 2 HP from units within a cone.

FullMoon.name: Full Moon
FullMoon.description: Give Lifesteal 1 to units in an area.

FullMoon2.description: Give Lifesteal 3 to units in an area.

Unearth.name: Unearth
Unearth.description: Dig up a body. It reanimates at the end of the round.

Unearth2.description:
Dig up a body. It reanimates at the end of the round.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BloodGeyser.name: Blood Geyser
BloodGeyser.description: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on another unit.

BloodGeyser2.description: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on units in an area.

Flatline.name: Flatline
Flatline.description:
Down yourself. You don't get injured. Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7]The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.[/s]

Flatline2.description:
Down yourself. You don't get injured. Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7]The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.[/s]
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

Replace.name: Replace
Replace.description: Teleport into a familiar and destroy it. Refresh your basic attack.

Replace2.description: Teleport into a familiar and destroy it. Refresh your basic attack and heal 5 HP.

SummonBones.name: Summon Bones
SummonBones.description: Summon a skeleton from a body.

SummonBones2.description:
Summon a skeleton from a body, anywhere.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

GigaDrain.name: Giga Drain
GigaDrain.description: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from an adjacent unit. Ignores shield.

GigaDrain2.description: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from a unit in range 3. Ignores shield.

Bloodletting.name: Bloodletting
Bloodletting.description: Remove all status effects from another unit, then inflict Bleed 5 on it.

Bloodletting2.description:
Remove all status effects from another unit, then inflict Bleed 5 on it.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

MassPsychosis2.description:
Inflict Madness on all enemies.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Debone.name: Debone
Debone.description: Deal damage and inflict Weakness on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.

Debone2.description: Deal damage, inflict Weakness and Immobile on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.

Reap.name: Reap
Reap.description: Teleport into a unit with 5 or less health and destroy it.

Reap2.description:
Teleport into a unit with 10 or less health and destroy it.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Haunt.name: Haunt
Haunt.description:
Damage any unit and inflict Fear.
[s:.7]Castable while downed.[/s]

Spook.name: Spook
Spook.description:
Deal damage to any unit. This has a 25% chance to inflict Fear.
[s:.7]Castable while downed.[/s]

CarrionShot.name: Carrion Shot
CarrionShot.description:
Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

CarrionShot_Afterlife.name: Carrion Shot
CarrionShot_Afterlife.description:
Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

CarrionShot2.description:
Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

CarrionShot_Afterlife2.description:
Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

LifeDrain.name: Lifedrain
LifeDrain.description:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with 50% hp.[/s]

LifeDrain_Afterlife.name: Lifedrain
LifeDrain_Afterlife.description:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with 50% hp.[/s]

LifeDrain2.description:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with max hp.[/s]

LifeDrain_Afterlife2.description:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with max hp.[/s]

CoffinFlop.name: Coffin Flop
CoffinFlop.description:
Jump to an open tile in range 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units dealing damage and inflicting Madness. [/s]

CoffinFlop_Afterlife.name: Coffin Flop
CoffinFlop_Afterlife.description:
Jump to an open tile in range 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units dealing damage and inflicting Madness. [/s]

CoffinFlop2.description:
Jump to an open tile in range 3.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units anywhere dealing damage and inflicting Madness 2. [/s]

CoffinFlop_Afterlife2.description:
Jump to an open tile in range 3.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units anywhere dealing damage and inflicting Madness 2. [/s]

DonateBlood.name: Donate Blood
DonateBlood.description:
Heal a unit 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

DonateBlood_Afterlife.name: Donate Blood
DonateBlood_Afterlife.description:
Heal a unit 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

DonateBlood2.description:
Heal all units in an area 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

DonateBlood_Afterlife2.description:
Heal all units in an area 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

Seance.name: Seance
Seance.description:
Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.[/s]

Seance_Afterlife.name: Seance
Seance_Afterlife.description:
Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.[/s]

Seance2.description:
Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its second turn.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.[/s]

Seance_Afterlife2.description:
Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its second turn.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.[/s]

GoLimp.name: Go Limp
GoLimp.description: Until your next turn, you won't get injured if you're downed.

GoLimp2.description:
Until your next turn, you won't get injured if you're downed.
When downed, inflict Confusion 10 on the unit that downed you.

DemonicPact.name: Demonic Pact
DemonicPact.description:
Injure yourself and take an extra turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

DemonicPact2.description:
Injure yourself and take an extra turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less. This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

Curse2.description:
Give a unit -4 [img:lck].
[s:.7](This spell has increased range)[/s]

LeechSwarm.name: Leech Swarm
LeechSwarm.description: Inflict Leech 3 on all units, except yourself.

LeechSwarm2.description: Inflict Leech 1 on each allied unit and Leech 3 on all other units, except yourself.

Feed.name: Feed
Feed.description: Destroy an adjacent body. Your basic attack inflicts +1 Leech for the rest of the battle.

Feed2.name: Feed
Feed2.description: Destroy a body at range. Your basic attack inflicts +1 Leech for the rest of the battle.

Hush.name: Hush
Hush.description: Inflict Sleep 1 on an adjacent unit.

Hush2.description: Inflict Sleep 1 on a unit in range 4.

ReaperStep.name: Reaper Step
ReaperStep.description: Teleport to an open tile in range 1. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range increases by 1.

ReaperStep2.description: Teleport to a tile in range 1, dealing damage to units you land on. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range and damage increase by 1.

ForbiddenFamine.name: Forbidden Famine
ForbiddenFamine.description:
Inflict Weakness 5, Poison 2, and Madness 2 on all enemies.
There are permanent consequences for casting this spell… but maybe not for you. 
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

ForbiddenFamine2.description:
Inflict Leech 2, Weakness 5, Poison 2, and Madness 2 on all enemies.
There are permanent consequences for casting this spell… but maybe not for you. 
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

FleshGolem.name: Flesh Golem
FleshGolem.description:
You and all allies lose 10 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell from each of those units.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

FleshGolem2.description:
You and all allies lose 10 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell and random passives from each of those units.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

TradeLife.name: Trade Life
TradeLife.description:
Swap HP with an ally in range 3.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.[/s]

TradeLife2.description:
Swap HP with any ally.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.[/s]

TradeLife_Afterlife.name: Trade Life
TradeLife_Afterlife.description:
Swap HP with an ally in range 3.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.[/s]

TradeLife_Afterlife2.description:
Swap HP with any ally.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.[/s]

AbsorbSoul.name: Absorb Soul
AbsorbSoul.description:
Down an ally in range 5 and steal their mana. It doesn't get injured.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

AbsorbSoul2.description:
Down any ally and steal their mana. It doesn't get injured.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Gravecrawl.name: Gravecrawl
Gravecrawl.description: Dig to any tile and unearth a body.

Gravecrawl2.name: Gravecrawl
Gravecrawl2.description:
Dig to any tile and unearth 1-3 bodies.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

DigUpTheDead.name: Dig Up the Dead
DigUpTheDead.description: Dig to any tile and unearth 4 zombies.

DigUpTheDead2.description:
Dig to any tile and unearth 4 zombies.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

SpiderEgg.name: Spider Egg
SpiderEgg.description: Inflict Infested 1 on a unit in range 3.

SpiderEgg2.description: Deal 1 damage and inflict Infested 1 on any unit.

ClewOfLeeches2.description: Surround a unit with beefy leeches.
